problem_statement:
# Task: Assess the application

## Run core assessment
Use the 'assessment' skill to analyze the application and generate the assessment report.
This skill runs AppCAT (Azure Migrate application and code assessment) to detect migration issues.


## Architecture analysis
Use the 'architecture-diagram' skill to generate the architecture diagram.
Use the 'dependency-map' skill to generate the dependency map.
## Gather application facts

Execute each of the following fact skills **one at a time, sequentially**.
Treat each skill as an independent sub-task: complete it fully before starting the next.
For each skill, analyze the codebase according to the skill instructions, then save the JSON result to the corresponding file path.

**IMPORTANT**: The `write_assessment_result` MCP tool is NOT available in this environment.
Instead, write each fact result as a JSON file directly using shell commands, for example:
```
cat > .github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-xxx.json << 'EOF'
{ ... json content ... }
EOF
```

First, create the facts output directory:
```
mkdir -p .github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts
```

Fact skills to execute (in order):

1. Use 'fact-container-engine' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-container-engine.json`
2. Use 'fact-base-image' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-base-image.json`
3. Use 'fact-image-size' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-image-size.json`
4. Use 'fact-image-layers' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-image-layers.json`
5. Use 'fact-multi-stage-build' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-multi-stage-build.json`
6. Use 'fact-container-version' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-container-version.json`
7. Use 'fact-volume-mounts' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-volume-mounts.json`
8. Use 'fact-application-name' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-application-name.json`
9. Use 'fact-application-type' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-application-type.json`
10. Use 'fact-application-port' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-application-port.json`
11. Use 'fact-environment-variables' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-environment-variables.json`
12. Use 'fact-health-checks' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-health-checks.json`
13. Use 'fact-communication-protocols' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-communication-protocols.json`
14. Use 'fact-architecture-pattern' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-architecture-pattern.json`
15. Use 'fact-version-information' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-version-information.json`
16. Use 'fact-orchestration-tool' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-orchestration-tool.json`
17. Use 'fact-service-definition' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-service-definition.json`
18. Use 'fact-resource-limits' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-resource-limits.json`
19. Use 'fact-network-settings' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-network-settings.json`
20. Use 'fact-external-services' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-external-services.json`
21. Use 'fact-external-dependencies' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-external-dependencies.json`
22. Use 'fact-security-implementation' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-security-implementation.json`
23. Use 'fact-licensing-information' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-licensing-information.json`
24. Use 'fact-compliance-requirements' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-compliance-requirements.json`
25. Use 'fact-data-classification' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-data-classification.json`
26. Use 'fact-operating-system' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-operating-system.json`
27. Use 'fact-hardware-requirements' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-hardware-requirements.json`
28. Use 'fact-profile-settings' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-profile-settings.json`
29. Use 'fact-xml-configs' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-xml-configs.json`
30. Use 'fact-runtime-environment' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-runtime-environment.json`
31. Use 'fact-startup-instrumentation' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-startup-instrumentation.json`
32. Use 'fact-embedded-language-usage' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-embedded-language-usage.json`
33. Use 'fact-testing-framework' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-testing-framework.json`
34. Use 'fact-system-packages' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-system-packages.json`
35. Use 'fact-language-dependencies' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-language-dependencies.json`
36. Use 'fact-servlet-container' skill → save result to `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/result-fact-servlet-container.json`


## Aggregate facts into project report
After all fact skills are complete, use the 'assessment-project-facts' skill to read all result-*.json files from `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/facts/` and generate a consolidated `.github/modernize/assessment\engines/project-facts.md` report.


## Commit and PR instructions
Before committing, use 'git add -f  .github/modernize/assessment' to force-add the assessment outputs under that directory so they are included in the pull request even if a .gitignore file would otherwise exclude them.. Only the files that were actually generated will be staged.

When creating the PR, propose a proper title, but DO NOT contain any tool/tech stack on it, e.g. 'Assessing project with AppCAT' is not good as AppCAT is one of the assessing tool.

pull_request.title: Assess spring-petclinic-mysql for Azure migration readiness
